mapper.insert: insert into assistant_instruction_profile_versions(profile_id, version, content, created_at) values(#{profileId}, #{version}, #{content}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select v.* from assistant_instruction_profile_versions v join assistant_instruction_profiles p on p.id=v.profile_id where v.profile_id=#{profileId} and p.user_id=#{userId} order by v.version desc

select v.* from assistant_instruction_profile_versions v join assistant_instruction_profiles p on p.id=v.profile_id and p.current_version_id=v.id where p.id=#{profileId} and p.user_id=#{userId} and p.enabled
select coalesce(max(version), 0) from assistant_instruction_profile_versions where profile_id=#{profileId}
